title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Kozuki Alliance, Unknown person #7, Chopper, Unknown person #8 as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see, I understand majority of the plan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But if we were to arrive with such amount of ships..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Be prepared to disembark at once!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Will not need ships to return back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But if we had to run away?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't even think about it idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should manage to hide some ships! You guys disembark first.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Everyone don't get caught in doubt.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should be proud to have challenged a yonko.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Look at the end of the bridge!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah! The Samurais take on the appearance of the bad guys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: FAFAFA! It's how our enemies dress like!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You guys may look like Pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So attack as you please, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just know the enemy out- numbers us, about one to five!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I highly suggest you make use of my camouflage!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will revert you back to your Kimonos as soon as you take off your costume...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Try to avoid as much confrontation as possible until we reach the castle and our final battle begins!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 40 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
